name: Jay Inslee
subject: We can't -- we WON'T -- be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
This past year, we proved that Washington is the nation's leader. Let's keep that going.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a4b0/2f5ea88d/79aa1991/2cbdf9b4/3746437250/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/posts/10157003331178466") Friend, If we proved anything last year, it's that this Washington can't -- and won't -- be stopped by the other Washington. The other Washington has worked to end any progress on fighting climate change -- while we are cutting back on our use of fossil fuels. The other Washington has tried to stymie immigration and diversity -- while we ensure we are a safe haven for _everyone_. The other Washington is showing disregard for our children's safety and education -- while we have worked hard to pass commonsense gun reform and build a world-class education system. Let's put it this way: The other Washington proves time and time again that they won't fight for everyday people. Well, this Washington does. We're not going to quit for a second. **That's why I focused today's State of the State address not just on what we've accomplished, but everything we are going to strive for in the future.** [**Share this post on Facebook to show your friends and family how we'll keep pushing forward.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a4b0/2f5ea88d/79aa1991/2cbdf9b4/3746437250/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/posts/10157003331178466") Washington has proved, over and over again, that we are the nation's progressive leader. We led the country to begin legalizing marijuana, and we're pardoning thousands of people with misdemeanor convictions as a result of the past prohibition. We've invested a remarkable amount in our children and their education, from preschool programs all the way through financial aid for college. We've created thousands and thousands of clean energy jobs for our residents. And that's just the start. This year, I know we can make even more difference, and show the rest of the nation how it's done. Just months ago, our state was engulfed in smoke from wildfires. We've seen record high temperatures across the world, low snowfall, and species like orcas suffering as a result of climate change. Climate change is the single most urgent issue we are facing right now, and that's why Washington is developing real, actionable solutions. We can -- and we will -- pass legislation that will help us become completely free from fossil fuel dependency. Of course, we can't stop there. We are going to be reforming our mental health system. We are going to be investing in students' career dreams. We are going to connect families to learning services for their young children. And we are going to introduce a public health care option. For 2019, we are resolving to show the other Washington how it's done. [**Share my post on Facebook and read more about the State of the State address.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a4b0/2f5ea88d/79aa1991/2cbdf9b4/3746437250/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/posts/10157003331178466") I'm proud that you've been at my side through all of this. I'm proud that I have you to count on for the future. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SHARE ON FACEBOOK »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a4b0/2f5ea88d/79aa1991/2cbdf9b4/3746437250/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee/posts/10157003331178466")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a4b0/2f5ea88d/79aa1991/2cbdf9cb/3746437250/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Do you want to take Indiana to the Next Level?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Eric Holcomb is hard at work! His Next Level Jobs program is helping Hoosiers throughout our state build in-demand skills -- in fields like | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=173b988a16844b0fbe2745603db471b0&_e=WO_8FoDwAJ4SfflsFG2_Z6ECDvLzHZ-JOKqpUk85lmI_gCUjyzaSk_H1gIb4euXO9TPktmCVc0hnXAD1r6HLFbeth-fFXtpZHMaMNDK7O7tZqP4JoZpDsBhwweKcm4g-It1YNL5tI9XNX-RJsLsj2Sl1AiveGAdePSd-C26Fuz_x0uWsrtUGv3Y-cgRZl14tDYs7aNKWySD4DMIpKhYWpZqV0frP4-CI9LhGeHcPV4RQ8h0aOGu8gorhLMhA1w_wy--KCUYIHn21dC84PyQ-LwOIDz5aFEymVO6z0PLiAiPblblBoKdHUK0wQUSYUf227dem0hljHIZwzE271bzQkmSy30rNZ5HeI6aJ1sbIL2h1x_A-B-HPIVV-jGvkfgRntk2_dw0Uuaa5Rd9SSaY4O16H8QlpyL555PN68Ssc8DlU6ddskoAX9y7IcuFj5skx) |

Friend, Governor Eric Holcomb is hard at work!

His Next Level Jobs program is helping Hoosiers throughout our state build in-demand skills -- in fields like manufacturing, construction, logistics, technology, and life sciences.

And it’s putting even more Hoosiers to work!

Through Next Level Jobs, we’ve trained Hoosiers throughout the state, and are helping employers find qualified workers to fill their open jobs.

And it's only going to keep getting better!

If you stand with Governor Holcomb in his efforts to improve our economy for all Hoosiers, please sign our petition today: **[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/priorities/](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=173b988a16844b0fbe2745603db471b0&_e=WO_8FoDwAJ4SfflsFG2_Z6ECDvLzHZ-JOKqpUk85lmI_gCUjyzaSk_H1gIb4euXO9TPktmCVc0hnXAD1r6HLFbeth-fFXtpZHMaMNDK7O7tZqP4JoZpDsBhwweKcm4g-It1YNL5tI9XNX-RJsLsj2Sl1AiveGAdePSd-C26Fuz_x0uWsrtUGv3Y-cgRZl14tDYs7aNKWySD4DMIpKhYWpZqV0frP4-CI9LhGeHcPV4Q-X6J__POsjXDa7oAm5eHVeey2SG6tBgxSaFJgAJPFAWTSYtEj6y_Bu1YsSkabfWZowxpAGtRzGO_WsGU4BCaIvGMH5rdT5Aujlo1nvu6D_IgFhfwNA8iuZahsYo_eZU4dU_NuuLIRZnFOj5hMWUsLci4kKrS7VbL-q9mOOj3HCzHL_aY08achS-Uj1n3II-5UvBCAMEZ5ueYjVwU8oocd)**

We want to show Governor Holcomb how much support he has for his jobs plan ...and we’d love for him to see your signature.

Please, add your name today.
[ **SIGN THE PETITION >>** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=173b988a16844b0fbe2745603db471b0&_e=WO_8FoDwAJ4SfflsFG2_Z6ECDvLzHZ-JOKqpUk85lmI_gCUjyzaSk_H1gIb4euXO9TPktmCVc0hnXAD1r6HLFbeth-fFXtpZHMaMNDK7O7tZqP4JoZpDsBhwweKcm4g-It1YNL5tI9XNX-RJsLsj2Sl1AiveGAdePSd-C26Fuz_x0uWsrtUGv3Y-cgRZl14tDYs7aNKWySD4DMIpKhYWpZqV0frP4-CI9LhGeHcPV4RJ719OPZFFJdfWdPxANb6WVWHSCHoKee0pGXStzIClOe6PM0Yz53qV8tL33-fPvMkBAiUvCHj9LF3yThyTBcNKNqCO1Pq0Z-oJKn6n7b5S0E8SfDR9ix-a-kMQ2bJInUfIpqPoF6DkrEawXLg0dNcD3fwbQBh6TV0dEgBfxMqMQJ5u6ftbQ9x1NR7eLt7C0dZV5yeNjS_0nLzvY3V-WdI6)
Let’s take Indiana to the NEXT LEVEL.

-Holcomb Crew

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: There is dignity in all work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | There are too few people in Washington who recognize and respect the dignity of work. It's simple: If you work hard, you ought to be able to get ahead. That means you have the healthcare you need when you get sick, and the security you deserve when you retire. Too many in Washington have forgotten that. I haven't. This country wasn't built by politicians -- it was built by hardworking people and families all across this country. America is a nation of workers, and you deserve to have their interests and concerns be a part of the national conversation. That's why I'm proud to have you on this team, Peter, **because when you love this country, you fight for the people that make it work.** And I know, together, we'll continue doing just that. Together, we'll fight so hard work pays off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. Together, we'll fight to fix our broken tax system to put more money in the pockets of working families and stop handouts to Wall Street and corporations that ship jobs overseas. Together, we'll fight for equality for all. We need to address discrimination that makes it even that much harder for women and people of color to get ahead no matter how hard they work. Together, we'll fight for accessible, affordable healthcare for all. Together, we'll fight for justice when President Trump senselessly shuts down the government, leaving 800,000 workers without paychecks. I can't wait for what the future holds, and I'm looking forward to fighting, **together** , for a better America. With gratitude, Sherrod | | | [Contribute](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffde0/4462dc26/881b0d9e/201ee404/2572003718/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe190115?refcode=sbe190115_m")
---

|
---

| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

name: Greg Pence
subject: re: vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
Every day that Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer continue this government shutdown, our nation’s border remains vulnerable. I hope you will join me today Every day that Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer continue this government shutdown, our nation’s border remains vulnerable.
I hope you will join me today and chip in to help President Trump get the funding he needs to secure our border and get the federal government back to work:
**[https://secure.gregpencevictory.com/action-507074](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA35ODRNCvzCKLXhRbUwvINk1LF9o0g8Uq9tbMOKEl5ssYAXJfuBEM-j6GY88K7Nv1-fDHGQjj6_QoyyD-amK7vQn7eCQ_NS17U1nMYryhU-nvtf6L-iCOpxevjjQfkCr1buUhvqAqY1qmdKSboI7c9qWwk_F5YKG-pgMdc0p5PUsUUNsQ4TgJWfzn-evq5-Ag0Q4JpMB4CgQ_IFYY6b2FrvWSeiK6elJLfd74W3FIsRK6PdqTujL6Vj_JQq3Wye5e67r9jpJ4WSk6KWychmYPxNATJ-MTVAR8P5WFmB4XrmlogcFL9eryrILXsgNswxX_c_f8y9FFgA0tUm54JmNXPVXpp4oht6X_tGmwTDm0_yVE%3D)**
When it comes down to it, this is not just a matter of solving our illegal immigration problem, it’s a matter of national security and protecting our sovereignty.
If we don’t have a border, we don’t have a country at all, and that’s why it's so important you stand with me to demand the Democrats fund the wall and open the government now. | |
---
[ **Secure our border: $6>>** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA3mdKARfhuHH5HyGFScNk_LFeUyNbrgeW3d_YyhoIIfYUq4RWQxH_nFqtiSTrbgJ-BfumswP6UWZynI2Et_msneradmpaTvD9svl7_CBAmzfT3GsUTOpJJK_YA9_b6JlXOqkhLFC-RcMDYFj4yctTDcsxjXNMhVVx49ss2VLitvMnnJvW-0vulJCPHdGlGADduXfw3z3X2SmhWJ2336ezbwnlDa_Q1QiXhJK04MYZ0Tdku90vAz6qQXV1fBtGdxLOmPnfJUpP7MI5CQCd2xKiH-4FvON2mv7bwmHY42nLn_8JJOiUMkj5OSASWbly2pY1yS7ebnTUa3ODhrlpm_rPF-3aq3azy3zU4iiMwcaBzpzcslBOiCWqlqhrbPS7i7jZm)
|
---
Thank you,
Greg Pence

**Stand with me and President Trump to demand border security funding.**
**[>>CHIP IN NOW<<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA35ODRNCvzCKLXhRbUwvINk1LF9o0g8Uq9tbMOKEl5ssYAXJfuBEM-j6GY88K7Nv1-fDHGQjj6_QoyyD-amK7vQn7eCQ_NS17U1nMYryhU-nvtf6L-iCOpxevjjQfkCr1buUhvqAqY1qmdKSboI7c9qQJHJZQlEQHKYVYJ9MTTZkCUVAgkarEpIXbPuG14xfge2Q2B57M0303wkRNSBlwQN-dH_Oox0Gzc3ZQYfLngSBYWT8o7BQEwT1ZUybu8lw3K9F9kU-Scc6L8yEt-pk7dyxAIae-f1KDj_jJ-IySVPVpNhNJBNBBouvUskd-6h0gPCd6zO5N1NoG8ByTM-Q-917_qkXLwunJlO0GeXiWjSnk%3D) **
|
---
[ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA35ODRNCvzCKLXhRbUwvINk1LF9o0g8Uq9tbMOKEl5ssYAXJfuBEM-j6GY88K7Nv1-fDHGQjj6_QoyyD-amK7vQn7eCQ_NS17U1nMYryhU-nvtf6L-iCOpxevjjQfkCr1buUhvqAqY1qmdKSboI7c9qao-Ak_N3r4L7LmATgFaoP3B70Rp6xKizdxjHEY6Vjj1YjTdZQ_fgCUESouuh_LzOfPDVAIGla1_RSmGg7-ER8I0nG_-TZ24v5oXtYFWYVNeaKDKMasCVlNkdfbWCTFxzE850NwhCrGBOmmuAu6fm9aFRJI-Kt3XM9oUDZWQD0EZsdXm_N_nwCVYlG9yL78GPUoI6DK88elRsHs4sxIi-sg%3D)
|
---
It’s a well-known fact that there's a humanitarian crisis at our Southern border.

American families are at risk. Migrant families are at risk. Children - on both sides of the border - are at risk.

**And Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer stand in the way of fixing it. They refuse to fund our much needed border wall.**

I'm going to continue standing strong to help fulfill President Trump's promise to Make America Safe Again by funding our border wall. **[Will you chip in to stand with me in this fight for our security?](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA35ODRNCvzCKLXhRbUwvINk1LF9o0g8Uq9tbMOKEl5ssYAXJfuBEM-j6GY88K7Nv1-fDHGQjj6_QoyyD-amK7vQn7eCQ_NS17U1nMYryhU-nvtf6L-iCOpxevjjQfkCr1buUhvqAqY1qmdKSboI7c9qQg39-KjkiQPB0e80HvH77b31x6FgrYQL2KI-ye19KohRLmvKNzY6VxVOEvsnYh4zOS6Wnh3lmIw5WAT2TqCK2c4CYbjB-NW_w-YzkyKr2ul4ZHGS4qFXCXxwRftBX3RGvX9DKOMD11XV15-0HuLVHNIRAnJDuG49B7SFnuX0GHpnFSYr5FVIF1nnLQtxrQtjjCrGWj_uxSqZxasP-LVk6w%3D)**

The liberal Democrats have made it clear that they are not trying to solve our problems, they're just playing politics. And America's federal workers are going without pay while they do it!

It’s not right that Congress gets paid while our federal workers are going without, and our government is shut down. That’s why **I’m refusing my pay while the government is shut down.**

It's time to get to work on fixing our broken immigration system and getting President Trump the funding he needs to secure our border and get our government back open.
|
---
[ **Secure our border: $6>>** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA3mdKARfhuHH5HyGFScNk_LFeUyNbrgeW3d_YyhoIIfYUq4RWQxH_nFqtiSTrbgJ-BfumswP6UWZynI2Et_msneradmpaTvD9svl7_CBAmzfT3GsUTOpJJK_YA9_b6JlXOqkhLFC-RcMDYFj4yctTDcsxjXNMhVVx49ss2VLitvMkE-wKOwqwI6hUYkypZ4987OwmyymRfi8UBAXAf5Bpn9o4wtrxMNIhEB5vpC2wpc3TMi1hhR_OYsky6sqSBQHgbl1xIYCar3C1ohaznbc3AvQzy68sUYoVktS3pq9IiUSAXy3WHRzp_h62QJzq255oaJWy19a54BizeYzefl1JCIqMPCyh5lYRG9MONvbkAWCTV0KRMXo0Fs4YtYXU-UY9f)
|

The solution is simple. All we need is for Congress to do the right thing.

Chip in now if you agree we should fund the wall and get the federal government back to work NOW: **[https://secure.gregpencevictory.com/action-507074](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=5fcb7c508e4348deaae4a865406c66ef&_e=dRa0RKvOu3UsjlK0uJNfnuWYo1Ix-QSo68qwg-Udxe-ig1fpNR-Yk6CfqjqkAJA35ODRNCvzCKLXhRbUwvINk1LF9o0g8Uq9tbMOKEl5ssYAXJfuBEM-j6GY88K7Nv1-fDHGQjj6_QoyyD-amK7vQn7eCQ_NS17U1nMYryhU-nvtf6L-iCOpxevjjQfkCr1buUhvqAqY1qmdKSboI7c9qa9RdfJ9ALEYPD-h_QdQWSZFikxSVwmAs-K9hw6-arV40EHPfsvwAcUKK3DpL_uHf5OBQQpAKN6HhEnkZwKQcH1olvtgtpFhroF2bIEO_IGbetJYt4Kj73KXr47xdxyvvDmjm0uVrlZ-0TSur_ByWQ9cm1KJfvUiBlelebikiZIWgcJc8fmrXXrx6awpvf55xKrnnQo1zpDzWplXbAfykoM%3D)**

Thank you,
Greg Pence

name: Team Stanton
subject: stopping corruption THIS year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
The _Citizens United_ ruling has been disastrous for American democracy.
It has allowed dark money from special interests to flow into our politics, corrupting the electoral process.

**We can stop the corruption THIS year by putting pressure on Congress to pass the campaign finance reform bill titled H.R. 1.**

[**Will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the bill?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ffTg26qjYdWSOE6HphjH7jyFWJNRqT9aAG0b5yCAVSM=/6hE0P5w3kM3MjC0DRwqE4gJtxWJhD3FRSNZEXyfyzQU=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/HR-1-Stanton-AB)

Thank you for taking action!

Team Stanton

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ffTg26qjYdWSOE6HphjH7jyFWJNRqT9aAG0b5yCAVSM=/6hE0P5w3kM3MjC0DRwqE4gJtxWJhD3FRSNZEXyfyzQU=?source=Stanton&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/HR-1-Stanton-AB)

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: Shutdown or not, my work continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Make sure you stay up to date.
|
---
| | Team -- right now, we're on Day 26 of the Trump shutdown. While Trump throws tantrums in an attempt to build a wasteful, cruel, ineffective border wall, I'm going to continue doing what Florida families sent me to Washington to do: **to fight for the middle class, access to health care, women 's rights, and more.** Ensuring that all Floridians have access to good jobs and to affordable health care will **_always_** be more important than Trump's hateful fear mongering. With everything going on in Washington, I want to make sure you stay up to date on what's happening and what I'm working on. Please, take a minute to follow me on [**Facebook**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd0/622b7b5b/1e75db7f/307b7610/3757428019/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/190115fbb"), [**Instagram**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd0/622b7b5b/1e75db7f/307b7613/3757428019/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/190115igb"), and [**Twitter**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd0/622b7b5b/1e75db7f/307b7612/3757428019/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/190115twb"). | | | [Facebook](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd0/622b7b5b/1e75db7f/307b7610/3757428019/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/190115fbb")
---
| | [Instagram](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd0/622b7b5b/1e75db7f/307b7613/3757428019/VEsD/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/190115igb")
---
| | [Twitter](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cd0/622b7b5b/1e75db7f/307b7612/3757428019/VEsA/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/190115twb")
---
No matter what's happening in Washington, I'm proud to be fighting for South Florida values and to have you in this fight with me.
Thank you for all you do,
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: I'm asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Can I have one minute of your time?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d20b/c1f7015/61f6933f/1140c529/1532404246/VEsH/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/2019-priorities-survey?source=rtw_20190116_em-full") Friend, As I've always said, this grassroots movement we've built together isn't about me -- it's about you. My team and I are setting legislative priorities for the year. So I'm coming to ask you: What would you like me to work on in 2019? **[Please take a few minutes to fill out our 2019 Priorities Survey so I can best advocate for you.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d20b/c1f7015/61f6933f/1140c529/1532404246/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/2019-priorities-survey?source=rtw_20190116_em-full")** [Take Our Survey](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d20b/c1f7015/61f6933f/1140c529/1532404246/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/2019-priorities-survey?source=rtw_20190116_em-full") From increasing access to health care to addressing climate change, there's a lot we need to tackle in Washington -- and I'm ready to get to work. Thank you for sharing your thoughts, Tina
---
